title: "If No IUML...": Congress's VD Satheesan Counters 'Communal Ally' Charge
description: Alleging a nexus between the BJP-ruled Centre and the CPM-led Kerala government, Leader of the Opposition in the Assembly, VD Satheeshan, said Chief Ministers in all non-BJP-ruled states, except Pinarayi Vijayan, are facing heat from central agencies
